entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the crop studied to investigate dry matter production, water use, and light interception

entities.name: CENTRAL INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the field site for the study was located

entities.name: STORED WATER
entities.description: The agricultural practice of growing crops using water stored in the soil profile

entities.name: DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total biomass produced by the shoots and roots of the plant

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process and amount of water transpired by the plant foliage

entities.name: INTERCEPTED RADIATION
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation captured by the plant foliage

entities.name: WATER DEFICITS
entities.description: The state of insufficient water availability that limits plant growth

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The overall increase in plant biomass and development

entities.name: PLANT SPACING
entities.description: The density of the plant population, ranging from sparser to densest stands
